title: Ortholoma filipes
taxonomy: Ortholoma filipes belongs to the family of flowering plants, Aizoaceae. It is native to South Africa and is part of the genus Ortholoma. The classification of Ortholoma filipes is further broken down into its species and genus levels. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
constituents: Ortholoma filipes is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, but specific information on its active constituents is limited in available sources. These compounds are often found in various plant species and may contribute to their potential health benefits. Further research is needed to determine the specific active constituents of Ortholoma filipes and their effects on human health.
